SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.Entities

Interface CanGrow

All Known Implementing Classes:
AxialMold, AxialMold1, CircMold1, CircularMold, DividedMold1, Mold, ProximalMold
public interface CanGrow
Trait interface for objects that can grow over time.

Implementations update their internal growth state when grow(int) is invoked. The totalGrowthOnCell parameter allows growth behavior to depend on the aggregated growth present in the containing Cell.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getGrowthRate()
     
    int
    grow(int totalGrowthOnCell)
    Apply one growth step to the implementing object.
    boolean
    isAbleToGrow(int totalGrowthOnCell)
    Determines whether the entity is able to grow during the current step.
    void
    setGrowthRate(int growthRate)
    Sets the growth rate (units per step).

  • Method Details

    • grow

      int grow(int totalGrowthOnCell)
      Apply one growth step to the implementing object.
      Parameters:
      totalGrowthOnCell - the sum of growth values for all entities in the containing cell; implementations may use this to alter growth behavior
      Returns:
      the resulting growth value after applying the growth step

    • getGrowthRate

      int getGrowthRate()

    • setGrowthRate

      void setGrowthRate(int growthRate)
      Sets the growth rate (units per step).
      Parameters:
      growthRate - the new growth rate to apply per simulation step

    • isAbleToGrow

      boolean isAbleToGrow(int totalGrowthOnCell)
      Determines whether the entity is able to grow during the current step.
      Parameters:
      totalGrowthOnCell - the sum of growth values for all entities in the same cell
      Returns:
      true if the entity can grow, false otherwise
